metadata.title: PAN-OS Device Telemetry Metrics Reference
metadata.description: PAN-OS can collect data about the health and configuration of your next-generation firewalls, as well as metrics related to threat prevention. This document identifies and describes all of the metric categories, as well as the individual metrics, that PAN-OS can collect.
metadata.keywords: Strata, Device Telemetry, Next-Generation Firewall, Telemetry, Device Telemetry Metrics Reference, Non-Cloud, PANW Yellow Theme, PAN-OS, Network Security
